description_long: This object consists of a cluster of three mushrooms with tall, slender, slightly curved stems and broad, flat caps. The caps are a vibrant blue color, adorned with irregularly sized white spots scattered across their surfaces. The stems are pale, almost white, with subtle shading that gives them a slightly organic, fibrous appearance. The caps are polygonal and somewhat angular, with the largest cap positioned at the top and two smaller ones branching out below. The mushrooms appear to be growing closely together, sharing a common base. The overall look is stylized and whimsical, reminiscent of fantasy or cartoon environments.
description: A cluster of three blue mushrooms with white-spotted caps and pale, slender stems, arranged in a whimsical, stylized manner.
description_view_0: Three blue-capped mushrooms with white spots, showing the stems' curvature and the caps' angular shapes from a side angle.
description_view_1: The tallest mushroom is most prominent, with the caps' undersides partially visible and the stems' height emphasized.
description_view_2: Top-down view highlighting the blue caps with white spots, showing the caps' broad, flat surfaces and their arrangement.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the backs of the caps and the clustered arrangement of the stems at the base.
